user_prompt: I need to an activation the volkite weapon
prayer:
Approach the volkite weapon with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Awakening to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.

Verify the volkite weapon's readiness through diagnostic litanies, ensuring the Machine Spirit hums with lethal potential.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for manufactorum a consecration
prayer:
Gather the electro-incense around the manufactorum's sacred forges, chanting the Consecration Doxology to honour the Omnissiah.
Sanctify each assembly arm of the manufactorum with ablative unguents, awakening its tireless Machine Spirits.
Invoke the Rite of Consecration upon the central cogitator, binding production logics to the Machine God's will.
Seal the manufactorum's halls with binaric seals, proclaiming its eternal devotion amidst the ceaseless labours.

user_prompt: Guide me through servo-harness a loading
prayer:
Kneel before the servo-harness, murmuring the Litany of Burden to rouse its multiplicitous Machine Spirits.
Anoint the mechadendrites of the servo-harness with lubricating sacraments, preparing for the loading sequence.
Commence the loading operation by feeding munitions into its grasping limbs, invoking the Omnissiah's precision.
Test the servo-harness's balance through ritual flexions, affirming the harmony of flesh and machine.

user_prompt: How do I bless the micro-servitor for sterilization?
prayer:
Present the micro-servitor to the sterilization altar, reciting the Purge Canticle to appease its fragile Machine Spirit.
Apply ablative rad-scourge to the micro-servitor's chassis, sanctifying its form against uncleanliness.
Initiate the sterilization cycle with focused las-incantations, burning away all profane contaminants.
Conclude with the Benediction of Purity, sealing the micro-servitor in the Omnissiah's unblemished grace.

prayer:
Grasp the inferno pistol firmly, whispering the Invocation of Judgement to awaken its voracious Machine Spirit.
Anoint the melta coils of the inferno pistol with incendiary chrism during the engagement phase.
Align the targeting auspex for engagement, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide the purifying flames.
Release the sanctified fury, intoning victory litanies as the inferno pistol consumes the impure.

Verify unity through auspex pings, sealing the rite with electro-consecration.

user_prompt: Consecrate the heat sink before cooling
prayer:

Monitor thermal auspex readings, proclaiming the heat sink's restored sanctity.

Test-fire upon test-slates, affirming the Omnissiah's lethal precision within.
